item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Fish fritters served with oven-baked potatoes,home-pickled cucumber salad and remoulade with crispy fennel-apple salad

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Peruvian beef patty in casserole with sauteedvegetables and fried potato/beet root cake, topped with herbs. Hereto AjiAmarillo sauce on the side Green dish: Peruvian pea protein patty in casserole with sauteedvegetables and fried potato/beet root cake, topped with herbs. Hereto AjiAmarillo sauce on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Classic Danish pork patties served with potatoes, creamed vegetables andpickled sides for balance GREEN DISH: Juicy mushroom steak served with potatoes and the same creamed vegetables

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Juicy Danish meatballs served with classic cucumber salad, rich brown gravy andpotatoes GREEN DISH: Flavourful plant based patty served with cucumber salad, brown gravy andpotatoes

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Spicy juicy Chicken tikka masala served with brownrice, freshly baked naan bread, coriander and lime on the side Green dish: Spicy vegetarian Chicken tikka masala made with soyprotein served with brown rice, freshly baked naan bread, coriander and lime onthe side
